'''Hesha Lovett''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Hapan]] royal vessel during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], Lovett cleared [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] to land on [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] in a stolen [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ship and then handed the comm over to [[Ta'a Chume]].
